description_long: This object is an egg with a smooth, slightly glossy surface, predominantly white with large, soft pink patches on one side. The pink areas are shaped like elongated ovals, converging at the narrower end of the egg, and are accented by a few fine, curved gray lines resembling stylized eyelashes or cracks. The egg has a classic ovoid shape, with a rounded top and a more pointed bottom. The pink coloration is concentrated on one side, giving it a distinctive, decorative appearance. The rest of the surface is unmarked and clean, with no visible imperfections or additional patterns. The overall look is whimsical and stylized, suggesting it may be intended for decorative or themed urban settings.
description: A smooth, white egg with large pink patches and fine gray lines, featuring a whimsical, stylized appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the egg's prominent pink patches and fine gray lines on a white surface, with the pointed end facing downward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the pink patch extending along one side and the egg's rounded white back, with some gray lines visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain white, unmarked surface of the egg, with only the pointed tip visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other pink patch and gray lines, mirroring the first side, with the pink area extending outward.
attribute_location: sidewalk display, urban park bench, or outdoor café table
attribute_orientation: upright with the pointed end facing downward
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely used as a decorative or themed item in an urban setting, such as during a festival or public art installation.
attribute_decorative_patterns: large pink patches with fine gray lines
